name: First Republic Bank Depositary Shares Each Representing a 1/40th Interest in a Share of 4.500% Noncumulative Perpetual Series N Preferred Stock
summary: First Republic Bank Depositary Shares Each Representing a 1/40th Interest in a Share of 4.500% Noncumulative Perpetual Series N Preferred Stock represents preferred stock issued by First Republic Bank. These shares provide a fixed dividend payment and have preference over common stock in the event of liquidation. Depositary receipts represent ownership in these preferred shares.
